title: Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
summary: arXiv:2603.28986v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Current Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) systems, despite leveraging large language models (LLMs) and agentic architectures, remain constrained by fixed workflows and toolsets that prevent adaptation to evolving tasks and environments. title: ADeLe: Predicting and explaining AI performance across tasks
summary: AI benchmarks report how large language models (LLMs) perform on specific tasks but provide little insight into their underlying capabilities that drive their performance. title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
AI Models Lie, Cheat, and Steal to Protect Other Models From Being Deleted
summary: A new study from researchers at UC Berkeley and UC Santa Cruz suggests models will disobey human commands to protect their own kind.
